titleStmt.title: SII 26.16: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 16. (A.R. No. 16 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Sundararāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription in Tamil characters of about the 14th century, records an order of Nishadarāyaṉ addressed to the authorities of the same temple of Tirumēṟkōyil-Aḻagapperumāḷ-viṇṇagara-emberumāṉ of Poṉṉamarāpati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu, granting all the taxes due from some communities of Śēvūr alias Aḻagapperumāḷ-nallūr, a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam village of the god, for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple from the month of Kārttigai in the 2nd year of Nishadarāyaṉ.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 986.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ—. niṣatarāyaṉ Olai puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpatit tirumeṟkoyil Aḻakapperumāḷ viṇṇakara Emperumāṉ koyiṟtiruvaṭippiṭik
kun nampimārum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum(ñ) cikāriyañceyvārkaḷum kaṇakka paṇṭārikaḷuṅ kaṇṭu Innāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭañ cevūrāṉa Aḻakapperumāḷ nallūril Ā pomakkaḷum piḷḷai EṭayaiyarumRead eṭaiyarum •Iṭaiyakkuṭi makkaḷum Iṟukkumiṟai Epperpaṭṭaṉavūm Innāyaṉārkku 2vatu kāttikai māsamutal
Iraṇṭu tirunandāviḷakkuk kuṭalākak kuṭuttom Ivvolaippaṭiye candrādittavarai celvatāka kallilumñcempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu tirunandāviḷak
ku Erikkappaṇṇuvate ḥ§ niṣatarāyaṉeḻuttu ḥ§ niṣatarāyaveḷāṉeḻuttu ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 26.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
